tagline: AI-native job application automation with multi-factor fit scoring

investor.title: Investor Narrative
investor.narrative: This system demonstrates AI-native job automation — a Claude agent operating inside a real browser, evaluating jobs against a candidate profile using multi-factor scoring (TF-IDF vectorization, taxonomy Jaccard overlap, skills matching). Each application takes ~45 seconds vs 8-12 minutes manually — a 10-16x throughput multiplier. The scoring engine ensures quality: only high-fit roles (65+ threshold) proceed. The persistent Q&A knowledge bank improves with every application, creating a compounding data asset. Architecture moat: file-based IPC bridge, no external services, fully self-contained.

partner.title: Technical Architecture
partner.narrative: Stack: Python 3 watcher (file-based IPC), SQLite WAL-mode database, JSON config files, Claude browser agent. Scoring pipeline: TF-IDF cosine similarity (20pt), Jaccard coefficient over taxonomy domains (25pt), direct skills overlap (30pt), title keyword matching (15pt), seniority level alignment (10pt). IPC design: Claude writes command JSON to ~/Downloads, watcher polls at 400ms, executes, writes response JSON. Watcher v2.0 auto-persists all responses for auditability. Resilience: checkpoint after every action, WAL mode, normalized Q&A dedup, rate limiting, 3 retries.

product.title: Product Demo
product.narrative: Step 1: Resume ingestion builds a vectorized, taxonomy-tagged candidate profile with 60+ searchable tokens. Step 2: Search profiles define keywords, location, and filters for LinkedIn Easy Apply listings. Step 3: Each job scored on a 100-point scale across 5 dimensions — most cluster 30-45, genuine matches score 65+. Step 4: Qualifying jobs get automated application via Q&A knowledge bank with self-improving answers. Step 5: Every operation logged, responses persisted, state checkpointed.

internal.title: Internal Review
internal.narrative: Current run: run_20260324_001 targeting DLP Easy Apply roles in NYC Metro. 25 jobs evaluated, 1 applied (Kforce — Principal Security Incident Lead, fit 68.0), 1 qualified (Pyramid Consulting — Zscaler DLP SOC Consultant, fit 74.0). Score analysis: 65-point threshold well-calibrated, 23/25 correctly identified as mismatches (avg 34.2). System health: Watcher v2.0 running, auto-persist active, SQLite WAL healthy, checkpoint current. Next steps: expand search profiles, tune weights if false negatives appear, build Q&A coverage.
